description: This API is the second release of the function used to initialize a new power flow case. All existing working case data will be lost upon execution of this API. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = newcase_2(options, basemva, basefreq, titl1, titl2)
python_syntax: ierr = newcase_2(options, basemva, basefreq, titl1, titl2)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying units for ratings (used to set the percent loading program option settings). (input; present program option setting by default). The values are as follows).

parameters.name: basemva
parameters.description: System base mva. valid base mva values range from 1.0 to 10,000.0. (input; 100.0 by default).

parameters.name: basefreq
parameters.description: System base frequency. valid base frequency values range from greater than 0.0 to less than 100.0. (input; present base frequency option setting by default).

parameters.name: titl1
parameters.description: First line of the new case title. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: titl2
parameters.description: Second line of the new case title. (input; blank by default).

options.description: units for ratings of non-transformer branches.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
